steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given equation.
$$a=\frac{v_f-14}{8}$$
Multiply both sides by $8$.
$$8a=v_f-14$$

steps.title: Compare the coefficient
steps.content:
Add $14$ to both sides.
$$v_f=8a+14$$
Comparing this with $v_f=xa+y$, the coefficient of $a$ is $8$. The answer is 8.
